raw_consumer_statement:
The background : I made a purchase on XXXX. com but the order was cancled without any notice. I then contaced the support, and the support offered to price match for me. However, I had to place a new order with links created by the customer support representative and pay full price for the new order. Once the new order shipped, I would then get a refund of the price difference. I had the representative confirm the price to be refunded in the chat and had them send out the whole situation with exact amount confirmed in writing through XXXX corporate email account. The amount to be refunded was {$860.00} USD. However when the new order shipped, they acknowledged the fact that they promised to price match and refund, but they simply refused to do so. This si bottom line fraud to me. If they did not promise to refund, I would not place the new order at all.This is detrimental reliance or promissory estoppel and they are scaming my money. Therefore I turned to citi to seek justice and hope citi would refund me the difference that XXXX promised. 
I filed a dispute with citi and they requested me to submit related document. I submitted the screenshot of conversion with customer support and screenshot of email detailling the pricematch promise that confirming the exact amount to be refunded. However my dispute case was still closed by citi due to lack of supporting documents. They requested me to submit the receipt showing the amount of {$860.00} but such receipt never existed.I then called citi 's customer service twice, to exlpain the situation and have them reopen the dispute. Both times the customer service agent assured me that they had requested to reopen the case and documented the situation. However to this date, I did not receive any update from citi and no refund or anything. The dispute case XXXX is still showing closed.
